reasoning: The 2025 National Heads-Up Poker Championship was filmed from August 1-3, 2025. Although the tournament results are intended to be kept secret until the episodes premiere on Peacock in late 2024/fall 2025, several poker news outlets (e.g., PokerScout, Casino.org) reported a significant leak on Polymarket in mid-October 2025. On October 14, odds for Sam Soverel moved to over 90%, while John Smith’s odds were notably depressed (the only other players with odds above 1% were not reported to include Smith). Given the historical accuracy of prediction market leaks for pre-recorded poker shows, it is highly probable that Sam Soverel is the winner. Consequently, the probability of John Smith winning is very low. Since the instructions specify a minimum probability of 0.05, that is the value submitted.
